_comment: TEMPLATE palette for cool-tone portraits (e.g. 2B from NieR:Automata). In 0.2.6 the VLM estimates were replaced/augmented by PIXEL-SAMPLED ground truth RGB (see scripts/sample_pixels.py + scripts/sampled_all.json). Pixel sampling closes KI-11 (VLM noise) but reveals KI-12: Marble-серия pixel-sampled RGB is much darker than VLM claimed, because the sampling window falls on the dark base/shadow of the marble object, not on its bright top surface. The 'skin' TODO remains open — none of the 28 known art decorations has a peach/tan RGB near (228,200,178). Sand Tussock pixel-sampled (112,99,79) confirmed too dark olive-tan for skin.
_how_to_fill: 1. In the game, place ONE of each missing decoration in your hideout.
4. The 'Unknown hashes' section lists the hash for each unknown name.
5. Add the entry to KNOWN_HASHES in src/hideout_art/constants.py.
6. Add the decoration name to ART_TYPES in the same file (if it's purely artistic).
7. Replace the TODO entries below with the actual decoration name.
9. To get accurate RGB: drop the .hideout + .jpg in исходники/ and run

_rgb_sources._method_0_2_4_0_2_5: VLM (glm-4.6v) analysis of screenshots — noisy (KI-11). Sand Tussock VLM RGB varied from (78,52,46) in 0.2.1 to (180,160,120) in 0.2.5.
_rgb_sources._method_0_2_6_PIXEL: Pixel sampling via scripts/sample_pixels.py. Ground truth RGB under each placement (median of N placements). Auto-calibration with --world-bbox functional. Sanity-checked: Stash gives believable brown wood (R>G>B, 64-182) in all 7 screenshots → calibration valid.
_rgb_sources._caveat_KI_12: Marble-серия pixel-sampled RGB is darker than VLM estimates because sampling window (4 wu radius) likely falls on the dark base/shadow of the marble object, not on its bright top surface. Marble Table placement 1 (237,208,169) is the only Marble placement that gave bright cream — others gave brown. To resolve: manual calibration + larger --sample-radius-wu on a screen with good Marble visibility.

_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6._comment: Pixel-sampled median RGB for all art decorations with placements in исходники/. Source: scripts/sampled_all.json (0.2.6). Calibration: AUTO with --world-bbox functional. Sanity-check: Stash RGB is believable brown in all 7 screenshots (calibration valid).
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6._method: scripts/sample_pixels.py: takes .hideout + .jpg, auto-calibrates world→pixel transform via CANAL_HIDEOUT_BOUNDS or functional bbox, samples a circle of radius 4 wu (~28-36 px depending on screenshot zoom) around each placement, computes median/mean/p25/p75 RGB. Aggregates median-of-medians across same-decoration placements.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Cave Fossil: (159, 136, 109) — n=8, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.4 (140,110,80) close.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Coastal Bush: (114, 98, 70) — n=4, source камни и кустарники.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (80,120,80) wrong — bush is brown not green.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Coastal Pebble: (127, 111, 86) — n=9, source галька.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.1 (134,115,94) close.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Falling Sand: (145, 125, 101) — n=1, source водоросли.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (255,192,203) wrong — NOT pink, brownish-tan (particle effect, sampling point may be in empty area between particles).
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Maraket Ornament: (113, 104, 82) — n=4, source укрошения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (197,153,102) too bright.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Maraket Rubble: (125, 112, 87) — n=11, source укрошения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (153,78,68) wrong — NOT reddish, neutral brown. KI-11 confirmed.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Maraket Samovar: (194, 157, 118) — n=2, source укрошения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (184,134,77) close.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Maraket Treasures: (116, 102, 85) — n=1, source укрошения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (191,154,111) too bright.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Marble Bench: (79, 64, 45) — n=1, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.4 (210,210,205) WRONG — sampling likely hit shadow. KI-12.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Marble Fountain: (110, 103, 76) — n=1, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.4 (230,230,220) WRONG — sampling likely hit shadow. KI-12.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Marble Table: (196, 170, 136) — n=2, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6 (mean of (237,208,169) bright cream + (154,132,104) brown). VLM 0.2.4 (200,200,195) close on R, but Pixel is browner. KI-12.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Marble Walls: (76, 68, 52) — n=1, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.4 (210,210,205) WRONG — sampling likely hit shadow. KI-12.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Medium Coastal Stone: (71, 67, 50) — n=9, source еще камни и растения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. Darker than Small Coastal Stone.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Sand Tussock: (112, 99, 79) — n=7, source камни и кустарники.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. RESOLVES KI-11: between VLM 0.2.1 (78,52,46) and VLM 0.2.5 (180,160,120). Real mid-tone is dark olive-tan. NOT skin tone — too dark and too olive.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Seaweed: (126, 111, 87) — n=7, source водоросли.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.5 (128,96,64) close.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Slender Seedling: (105, 93, 67) — n=7, source еще камни и растения.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Small Coastal Stone: (81, 80, 60) — n=5, source камни и кустарники.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. CONFIRMS VLM 0.2.5 (85,75,70) — dark warm-gray. Valid for 2B 'black' role.
_pixel_sampling_summary_0_2_6.Summit Brazier: (156, 133, 106) — n=4, source еще элементы.hideout. Pixel 0.2.6. VLM 0.2.4 (180,140,80) close.
_no_placements: Cordilina (11 placements only in Кордилой boundary file, not sampled)
Petrified Cave Figure (1 placement in Кордилой boundary file, not sampled)

_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.white: 2B's dress, skin highlights, skirt trim. Was FILLED in 0.2.4 by Marble Fountain (VLM 230,230,220). Pixel 0.2.6 shows Marble Fountain is actually (110,103,76) brown (KI-12 — sampling hit shadow). Marble Table placement 1 (237,208,169) is the only bright cream available. Status: NEEDS RE-EVALUATION via manual calibration.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.black: 2B's blindfold, hair, glove, boots. FILLED 0.2.5 by Small Coastal Stone. Pixel 0.2.6 (81,80,60) CONFIRMS VLM 0.2.5 (85,75,70) — dark warm-gray, valid for 'black' role.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.gray: Shadows on dress, sword blade, metal details. Was FILLED 0.2.4 by Marble Bench/Walls (VLM 210,210,205). Pixel 0.2.6 shows (79,64,45) and (76,68,52) — both dark brown (KI-12). Status: NEEDS RE-EVALUATION.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.silver: Sword blade highlights, metallic accents. Was FILLED 0.2.4 by Marble Table (VLM 200,200,195). Pixel 0.2.6 Marble Table placement 1 gives (237,208,169) bright cream — closest to silver available. Status: USABLE.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.skin: 2B's skin (visible near eyes/neck). STILL MISSING. Sand Tussock pixel-sampled (112,99,79) confirms it's dark olive-tan — NOT skin tone. No other known decoration has peach/tan RGB near (228,200,178). Need a new decoration from another hideout.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.pink: Glow accents, lips. Falling Sand pixel-sampled (145,125,101) brown — NOT pink. VLM 0.2.5 (255,192,203) was wrong (likely sampled an actual particle, not the gap between). Status: NEEDS RE-EVALUATION.
_colour_roles_needed_for_2b.red: Emblem on dress. Was FILLED 0.2.5 by Maraket Rubble (VLM 153,78,68 reddish). Pixel 0.2.6 (125,112,87) shows neutral brown — NOT reddish. Maraket Samovar (194,157,118) copper might be closer to red. Status: NEEDS RE-EVALUATION.

_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift._comment: Comparison of pixel-sampled (0.2.6) vs VLM-estimated (0.2.4/0.2.5) RGB. Positive drift = pixel is brighter than VLM. Negative = darker.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Sand Tussock: Pixel (112,99,79) vs VLM 0.2.5 (180,160,120): drift -68/-61/-41 (pixel darker). Resolves KI-11.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Small Coastal Stone: Pixel (81,80,60) vs VLM 0.2.5 (85,75,70): drift -4/+5/-10 (close — confirms VLM).
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Maraket Rubble: Pixel (125,112,87) vs VLM 0.2.5 (153,78,68): drift -28/+34/+19 (pixel NOT reddish). VLM was wrong.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Coastal Bush: Pixel (114,98,70) vs VLM 0.2.5 (80,120,80): drift +34/-22/-10 (pixel brown, VLM green). VLM was wrong.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Falling Sand: Pixel (145,125,101) vs VLM 0.2.5 (255,192,203): drift -110/-67/-102 (pixel brown, VLM pink). VLM sampled actual particle, pixel sampled gap.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Cave Fossil: Pixel (159,136,109) vs VLM 0.2.4 (140,110,80): drift +19/+26/+29 (pixel brighter). Close.
_0_2_6_pixel_vs_vlm_drift.Seaweed: Pixel (126,111,87) vs VLM 0.2.5 (128,96,64): drift -2/+15/+23 (close). Confirms VLM.

entries._role: pink (glow accents, lips) — Falling Sand pixel-sampled (145,125,101) is BROWN, not pink. VLM (255,192,203) sampled actual particle. Keeping VLM value for now; needs re-evaluation.
dark green (foliage background) — Long Grass pixel-sampled (136,119,93)
light green (moss accents) — Fringe Moss not pixel-sampled (no placements in исходники). Using 0.2.1 VLM estimate.
dark olive-tan (Sand Tussock) — Pixel 0.2.6 (112,99,79). NOT skin tone — too dark and too olive. Kept as a dark tan role only.

white (2B dress) — Marble Fountain pixel-sampled (110,103,76) brown (KI-12 — sampling hit shadow). VLM (230,230,220) likely closer to actual marble top. KEEPING VLM value until manual calibration resolves KI-12.
silver (sword blade, metallic accents) — Marble Table pixel-sampled (196,170,136) cream; placement 1 alone gives (237,208,169) bright cream — closest to silver. Using pixel value.
gray (shadows on dress, sword details) — Marble Bench pixel-sampled (79,64,45) brown (KI-12). VLM (210,210,205) likely closer to actual. KEEPING VLM value until KI-12 resolved.
gray alt (textural variety for dithered gradients) — Marble Walls pixel-sampled (76,68,52) brown (KI-12). KEEPING VLM value.
black (blindfold, hair) — Small Coastal Stone pixel-sampled (81,80,60) CONFIRMS VLM 0.2.5 (85,75,70). Dark warm-gray, valid for 'black' role.
skin tone (visible neck/face) — STILL MISSING. Sand Tussock pixel-sampled (112,99,79) confirmed too dark olive-tan. No peach/tan decoration available. Need new decoration from another hideout.

red (emblem) — Maraket Rubble pixel-sampled (125,112,87) is NEUTRAL BROWN, NOT reddish (VLM 0.2.5 (153,78,68) was wrong). Still kept as 'red' role candidate because it's the closest to red available. Maraket Samovar (194,157,118) copper may be a better alt.
